CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,426.28 FILED BY BLANZ, DAVID WILLY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SILVA TORRECILLA, ISLEYDYS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE DENNIS HAYASHI. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ISLEYDYS SILVA TORRECILLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID WILLY BLANZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE DENNIS HAYASHI. APPEARANCES: CROSS-COMPLAINANT DAVID WILLY BLANZ IS PRESENT. CROSS-DEFENDANT ISLEYDYS SILVA TORRECILLA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BLANZ, DAVID WILLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SILVA TORRECILLA, ISLEYDYS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVA TORRECILLA, ISLEYDYS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANZ, DAVID WILLY $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,770.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
